Bootstrap: .meta/ description tree generated for all top-level directories
Gap analysis produced (missing tests, undocumented APIs, arch concerns)
Spec: Domain fidelity verified — human confirmed core concept understanding
PRD written with /specify and reviewed by stakeholder
Common architectural concerns checklist completed (multi-tenancy, auth, billing, etc.)
Acceptance criteria defined for all features
Domain model validated by domain-modeler agent
Edge cases and error scenarios documented
Design: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) written for key decisions
System boundaries and component interfaces defined
Decompose: All PRD items decomposed into tasks via TaskMaster
Each task has acceptance criteria and test strategy
Every task has a t-shirt size (XS/S/M/L/XL)
Architect has reviewed technical detail on all tasks
Build: Docker Compose (or project run command) configured for local dev
Verify: Stack stood up via docker-compose (or project run command)
SEM provided human with access URL and test instructions
Feedback addressed or deferred with justification
Evaluate: Release notes written to docs/release-notes/ with velocity metric
Lessons learned captured for next iteration
